name: Leek, Potato & Kielbasa Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups sliced leeks, white part only, rinsed and drained
2 medium boiling potatoes, peeled and diced
1/4 cup finely diced red bell pepper, for garnish, optional
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small skillet, toast the fennel seed over moderate heat until very fragrant, about 2-3 minutes.
2. In a large saucepan, melt the butter and cook the leeks until very soft, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in the stock and potatoes and bring to boil.
4. Simmer the soup until the potatoes are tender, about 10-15 minutes.
5. Stir in the toasted fennel, kielbasa, cream, salt, and pepper to taste.
6. Before serving, stir in the arugula.
7. Garnish with red bell pepper, if desired.
Yield: serves 4
